skill.name: high-end-visual-design
skill.description: Guides AI assistants to create premium website interfaces with refined typography, spacing, card structures, motion, and responsive layout rules.
skill.summary: Create high-end, responsive visual designs with premium UI structure and motion guidance.
skill.author: leonxlnx

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported external command, weak cryptography, and reconnaissance patterns, but review found these are false positives from Markdown code spans, CSS utility examples, and design terminology in SKILL.md. No executable code, shell commands, network access, credential handling, prompt injection attempt, or data exfiltration behavior was found.

low_findings.title: Static Analyzer False Positives in Markdown Design Guidance
low_findings.description: The reported Ruby backtick execution locations are Markdown inline code examples for CSS classes, design tokens, and UI implementation notes. They do not execute commands and there is no script file or runtime code in the skill package.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged text appears inside a Markdown instruction file and consists of inline code formatting for CSS utilities and UI terms. No executable Ruby, shell script, or command invocation is present.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Alerts Are Design Text False Positives
low_findings.description: The reported weak cryptographic algorithm findings occur in skill metadata and design prose, not in cryptographic code. No hashing, encryption, signing, or authentication implementation is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The only reviewed file is Markdown guidance for visual design. The cited lines do not contain cryptographic APIs or security-sensitive algorithm choices.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance Alerts Are Non-Executable UI Instructions
low_findings.description: The reported reconnaissance locations describe UI layout, device viewport behavior, and design objectives. They do not inspect the host system, enumerate files, read environment data, or call operating system utilities.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Semantic review shows design language and CSS-oriented instructions only. There is no host reconnaissance command, API call, or data collection path.

content.value_statement: Generic AI website layouts often look flat, repetitive, and template-like. This skill gives Claude, Codex, and Claude Code concrete rules for premium spacing, typography, motion, and component depth.
actual_capabilities: Defines premium visual design rules for typography, spacing, cards, buttons, navigation, and motion.
Guides AI assistants toward varied layout archetypes instead of repeated generic page structures.
Provides responsive layout guardrails for mobile collapse, viewport height, and touch-friendly spacing.
Specifies motion patterns using transform, opacity, staggered reveals, and custom easing curves.
Identifies common low-quality UI defaults to avoid during frontend generation.
limitations: It is an instruction-only skill and does not include executable components or design assets.
It assumes the target project can use modern CSS utilities, React, Tailwind, or similar frontend patterns.
It prioritizes premium visual polish, which may not fit dense enterprise tools or strict design systems.
It does not perform accessibility audits, brand compliance checks, or browser compatibility testing by itself.

use_cases.title: Upgrade a Marketing Page
use_cases.description: Transform a basic landing page into a more polished, agency-style interface with stronger spacing, typography, and motion.

use_cases.title: Polish Frontend Prototypes
use_cases.description: Apply premium UI structure to React or Tailwind prototypes before stakeholder review or product demos.

use_cases.title: Guide Design Direction
use_cases.description: Use consistent design rules to brief AI assistants on layout variety, component depth, and responsive behavior.

prompt_templates.title: Improve a Simple Page
prompt_templates.prompt: Redesign this page with premium visual hierarchy, refined spacing, responsive layout, and tasteful motion. Keep the existing content and main user flow.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Landing Page
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a high-end landing page for [product]. Use a distinctive layout archetype, strong typography, polished cards, and mobile-first responsive behavior.

prompt_templates.title: Polish Existing React UI
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this React and Tailwind interface. Improve its visual depth, spacing, interaction states, and motion while preserving the existing functionality.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Premium Design System Section
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a premium component section with nested card architecture, responsive collapse rules, custom easing, and clear performance guardrails for animation.

output_examples.input: A plain SaaS hero section with a heading, paragraph, and call to action.
output_examples.output: A polished hero direction with stronger typography, a floating pill navigation, layered visual depth, refined call-to-action treatment, and responsive spacing.

output_examples.input: A generic three-column feature grid that feels like a template.
output_examples.output: An asymmetrical feature layout with varied card scale, nested surfaces, clear hierarchy, generous whitespace, and a single-column mobile fallback.

output_examples.input: A static product page with basic hover states.
output_examples.output: A motion-enhanced product page direction with staggered reveals, tactile button interactions, transform-based animation, and performance-aware blur usage.

best_practices: Provide the existing brand, audience, and content goals before asking for a redesign.
Ask the assistant to preserve core functionality while improving visual hierarchy and interaction detail.
Review generated designs on mobile and desktop because the skill emphasizes responsive layout behavior.
anti_patterns: Do not use it to override an established product design system without approval.
Do not request heavy animation for pages that must prioritize dense data entry or operational speed.
Do not accept generated UI without checking accessibility, contrast, and real content fit.

faq.question: Does this skill generate working code?
faq.answer: It guides AI assistants to generate or refine frontend code, but the skill itself contains only instructions.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists compatibility with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Is this only for landing pages?
faq.answer: No. It can guide marketing pages, product pages, portfolios, and frontend prototype polish.

faq.question: Does it include images, icons, or fonts?
faq.answer: No. It references design choices, but it does not ship font files, icons, or image assets.

faq.question: Can it replace a human designer?
faq.answer: No. It helps direct AI output, but human review is still needed for brand fit and usability.

faq.question: Why did security analysis flag this skill?
faq.answer: Static analysis mistook Markdown backticks and design tokens for risky code patterns. Manual review found no executable security risk.
